creator: dufresnep@zoho.com
text:
Have you tried the "modesetting" driver:

Like:
paul@dufresnep:~ $ cat /usr/local/etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/20-intel.conf 
Section "Device"
    Identifier "Card"
    #Driver "vesa"
    #Driver "intel"
    #Driver "scfb"
    # does not exist: Driver "glamor"
    Driver "modesetting"
EndSection
paul@dufresnep:~ $
